expectations.text: Runs the ecosystem status check script
Specifically reports on the Tax PDF Organizer status
expectations.evidence: Reports Tax PDF Organizer as Running with LaunchAgent and watcher details

expectations.text: Specifically reports on the Monarch Money MCP Server status
expectations.evidence: Reports Monarch Money MCP Server as Connected with authentication status

expectations.text: Indicates whether each is running, idle, or down
Does not confuse status checking with configuration
expectations.evidence: Purely reports status without suggesting any config changes
